name: Midtown
description: Midtown Atlanta is one of the city's most vibrant neighborhoods, known for its walkability, arts district, and strong rental demand from young professionals. The area features a mix of high-rise condos, historic homes, and new development, making it attractive for multiple investment strategies.
highlights: High walk score and transit access
Strong rental demand from young professionals
risks: Higher entry prices than surrounding areas

name: Buckhead
description: Buckhead is Atlanta's upscale commercial and residential district, offering luxury properties and strong appreciation potential. Known for high-end shopping, dining, and corporate offices, it draws affluent renters and buyers.
risks: Luxury market sensitivity to economic downturns

name: Deep Ellum
description: Deep Ellum is Dallas's arts and entertainment district experiencing rapid gentrification and investor interest. With rising rents, strong appreciation, and a vibrant culture scene, it offers multiple viable investment strategies.
